zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Talbot II於1205年出生在英國林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛時，他的父親Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I40歲，母親Emmeline de Grendon31歲。他於1229年1月與Matilda of Yorkshire在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1235年在英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Talbot II于1205年出生在英国林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛时，他的父亲Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I40岁，母亲Emmeline de Grendon31岁。他于1229年1月与Matilda of Yorkshire在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1235年在英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Talbot II was born in 1205, in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I, was 40 and his mother, Emmeline de Grendon, was 31. He married Matilda of Yorkshire in January 1229, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1235, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Talbot II est né en 1205, à Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Emmeline de Grendon, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Matilda of Yorkshire en janvier 1229, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1235, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

Er hat im Januar 1229 in Yorkshire, England Matilda of Yorkshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1235 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Talbot IIが1205年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアガインスボロウで生まれた時，父Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot Iは40歳，母Emmeline de Grendonは31歳であった。1229年1月にイギリスヨークシュアイアでMatilda of Yorkshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1235年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで30歳で死去した。

ko.Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire, England: 영국 더비실르 버턴 업 트렌트 스트 모드웬
ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Talbot II(이)가 1205년 영국 링코실르 게인스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Emmeline de Grendon(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1229년 1월 영국 요르크실르에서 Matilda of Yorkshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1235년 영국 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Talbot II nasceu em 1205, em Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Emmeline de Grendon, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda of Yorkshire em janeiro de 1229, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1235, em Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire, England: буртон упон трент ст модвен, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Talbot II родился в 1205 г. в местности геинсбороую, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Emmeline de Grendon, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda of Yorkshire январь 1229 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1235 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

Se casó con Matilda of Yorkshire en enero de 1229, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1235, en Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
